title: NIGHT SHELTER ANNEX - 211info
text: FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER NIGHT SHELTER ANNEX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a year-round community shelter that includes a wraparound case management program. Services include access to individual dorm units, laundry, showers, meals, and mail services. 4060 W Amazon Drive Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 and pregnant women (proof of pregnancy required) who are experiencing homelessness Hours: Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Intake: 7 days per week 9am-5pm (541) 342-7728 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-7728 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred through First Place Family Center FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on LTD bus routes 24, 28, and 36. Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER
